name: TOEFL Speaking

criteria.name: Delivery
criteria.description: Clear, fluid speech with good pacing and intelligible pronunciation; minor hesitations don't obscure meaning.

criteria.name: Language Use
criteria.description: Effective, accurate grammar and vocabulary; a range of structures used with control.

criteria.name: Topic Development
criteria.description: Relevant, coherent, well-developed response that fully answers the prompt with sufficient detail.

instructions: This is a transcript of a ~45-60 second spoken response captured by automatic speech recognition. Ignore transcription artifacts and filler words. A strong response is coherent, on-topic, and specific. Be encouraging but honest; ground each score in the rubric.
